title: Did Neeraj Chopra wear Rs 52 lakh-plus watch at Paris Olympics final, internet speculates - The Times of India
description: TECH NEWS : Neeraj Chopra, the Olympic silver medalist javelin thrower, wore an Omega Seamaster Aqua Terra Ultralight watch worth over Rs 52 lakh during the 2024
keywords: Swiss watchmaker Omega,Paris Olympics,Omega Seamaster Aqua Terra,Neeraj Chopra,javelin thrower
